features.evidence: foreign xiaomi s pocophone started off as flagship killers but with the poco f5 pro they ve moved into flagship territory at least price wise with a higher price comes higher expectations so is the poco f5 pro able to keep up with other high tier phones i m will for gsmarena and let s find out in our full review xiaomi is doing things a bit differently with this year s poco f5 pro it isn t aimed specifically at gamers and it comes at a price closer to a flagship than a mid ranger right off the bat though you d notice that the cameras are the same as those on the regular poco f5 despite the rearrangement of the camera bump on the back so how does the pro stand out from the mid range vanilla model there are indeed some upgrades here including a higher tier chipset a higher res screen a slightly larger battery and wireless charging also the f5 pro brings a glossy glass design the cameras are a neat accent and so are the stripes which run towards the plastic frame the phone feels nice in hand but a bit slippery there is ingress protection here rated at ip53 the same is on the regular f5 and other xiaomi mid rangers on the front the f5 pro s display has an extra sharp qhd resolution it s a 6

foreign xiaomi s pocophone started off as flagship killers but with the poco f5 pro they ve moved into flagship territory at least price wise with a higher price comes higher expectations so is the poco f5 pro able to keep up with other high tier phones i m will for gsmarena and let s find out in our full review xiaomi is doing things a bit differently with this year s poco f5 pro it isn t aimed specifically at gamers and it comes at a price closer to a flagship than a mid ranger right off the bat though you d notice that the cameras are the same as those on the regular poco f5 despite the rearrangement of the camera bump on the back so how does the pro stand out from the mid range vanilla model there are indeed some upgrades here including a higher tier chipset a higher res screen a slightly larger battery and wireless charging also the f5 pro brings a glossy glass design the cameras are a neat accent and so are the stripes which run towards the plastic frame the phone feels nice in hand but a bit slippery there is ingress protection here rated at ip53 the same is on the regular f5 and other xiaomi mid rangers on the front the f5 pro s display has an extra sharp qhd resolution it s a 6 However, but in most of the photos the skin tone is not natural and gives a white appearance

foreign xiaomi s pocophone started off as flagship killers but with the poco f5 pro they ve moved into flagship territory at least price wise with a higher price comes higher expectations so is the poco f5 pro able to keep up with other high tier phones i m will for gsmarena and let s find out in our full review xiaomi is doing things a bit differently with this year s poco f5 pro it isn t aimed specifically at gamers and it comes at a price closer to a flagship than a mid ranger right off the bat though you d notice that the cameras are the same as those on the regular poco f5 despite the rearrangement of the camera bump on the back so how does the pro stand out from the mid range vanilla model there are indeed some upgrades here including a higher tier chipset a higher res screen a slightly larger battery and wireless charging also the f5 pro brings a glossy glass design the cameras are a neat accent and so are the stripes which run towards the plastic frame the phone feels nice in hand but a bit slippery there is ingress protection here rated at ip53 the same is on the regular f5 and other xiaomi mid rangers on the front the f5 pro s display has an extra sharp qhd resolution it s a 6 However, but in display fingerprint sensor is missing instead a side mounted fingerprint sensor is given may be to bring under a budget maybe to keep a price to suit a flagship killer phone they might have reduced certain things

foreign xiaomi s pocophone started off as flagship killers but with the poco f5 pro they ve moved into flagship territory at least price wise with a higher price comes higher expectations so is the poco f5 pro able to keep up with other high tier phones i m will for gsmarena and let s find out in our full review xiaomi is doing things a bit differently with this year s poco f5 pro it isn t aimed specifically at gamers and it comes at a price closer to a flagship than a mid ranger right off the bat though you d notice that the cameras are the same as those on the regular poco f5 despite the rearrangement of the camera bump on the back so how does the pro stand out from the mid range vanilla model there are indeed some upgrades here including a higher tier chipset a higher res screen a slightly larger battery and wireless charging also the f5 pro brings a glossy glass design the cameras are a neat accent and so are the stripes which run towards the plastic frame the phone feels nice in hand but a bit slippery there is ingress protection here rated at ip53 the same is on the regular f5 and other xiaomi mid rangers on the front the f5 pro s display has an extra sharp qhd resolution it s a 6 However, 0 which means they both have liquid cooled vapor chambers though the f5 pro has a slightly larger vapor chamber cooling system and that s no surprise since the f5 pro has a beefier chipset it s a keep in check that being the snapdragon 8 plus gen 1 the standard f5 is no slouch either though since it houses an even newer chip and the first to offer it in the global markets that beanie snapdragon 7 plus gen 2

foreign xiaomi s pocophone started off as flagship killers but with the poco f5 pro they ve moved into flagship territory at least price wise with a higher price comes higher expectations so is the poco f5 pro able to keep up with other high tier phones i m will for gsmarena and let s find out in our full review xiaomi is doing things a bit differently with this year s poco f5 pro it isn t aimed specifically at gamers and it comes at a price closer to a flagship than a mid ranger right off the bat though you d notice that the cameras are the same as those on the regular poco f5 despite the rearrangement of the camera bump on the back so how does the pro stand out from the mid range vanilla model there are indeed some upgrades here including a higher tier chipset a higher res screen a slightly larger battery and wireless charging also the f5 pro brings a glossy glass design the cameras are a neat accent and so are the stripes which run towards the plastic frame the phone feels nice in hand but a bit slippery there is ingress protection here rated at ip53 the same is on the regular f5 and other xiaomi mid rangers on the front the f5 pro s display has an extra sharp qhd resolution it s a 6 However, but in display fingerprint sensor is missing instead a side mounted fingerprint sensor is given may be to bring under a budget maybe to keep a price to suit a flagship killer phone they might have reduced certain things

67 inch amoled with a 120hz refresh rate and gorilla glass fire protection besides the sharpness and the oled tech there are other goodies here as well support for 12 bit color dolby vision and hdr 10 plus video the colors can also be quite accurate based on the color settings you choose the max brightness here is also plenty for comfy use outdoors we measured a maximum of 520 nits with a manual brightness slider which can boost up to over a thousand nids in auto mode and the smooth 120hz refresh rate can dial down automatically to 60hz when idling or when playing certain content or apps you can wake up and unlock the poco f5 pro with an under display fingerprint reader a bit fancier than the side mounted one on the vanilla model but unlike the f5 you don t get a headphone jack here you d have to use an adapter for traditional headphones otherwise there s a pair of stereo speakers with dolby atmos support they have good loudness and the sound quality is decent with clean vocals and highs and a bit of bass foreign and the phone comes with 256 or 512 gigs of storage on board and that isn t expandable through microsd something which places the poco f5 pro into a higher tier than the regular f5 is this flagship grade snapper grenade plus gen 1 chipset but it s a modified version compared to the one you d find in last year s flagships this one has lower clock speeds sacrificing a bit of the peak performance for some theoretical energy savings there s no need to worry though in benchmarks the poco f5 pro still does a great job and keeps up with the phones running on the original version of the chipset the performance here is clearly flagship worthy however it s worth mentioning that the vanilla poco f5 with its new snapdroken 7 plus gen 2 nearly manages to keep pace with the pro the f5 pro features an advanced passive cooling system but in our prolonged stress tests as thermal management was just okay it maintains stable performance until a certain point when it started throttling heavily with repeated dips a behavior that could cause stutters while gaming the f5 pro s battery capacity is quite sizable at 5160 milliamp hours the battery life is decent but less than the f5s with an endurance rating of 99 hours and some subpar screen on time when web browsing the f5 pro supports 67 watt charging which is quite speedy able to charge the phone from 0 to 86 percent in half an hour their support for wireless charging too which you don t get on the vanilla model the interface of the new poco phones is xiaomi s latest miui 14 running on top of android 13 However, 0 which means they both have liquid cooled vapor chambers though the f5 pro has a slightly larger vapor chamber cooling system and that s no surprise since the f5 pro has a beefier chipset it s a keep in check that being the snapdragon 8 plus gen 1 the standard f5 is no slouch either though since it houses an even newer chip and the first to offer it in the global markets that beanie snapdragon 7 plus gen 2
